(******************************************************************

 Preservation of inserters by right biadjoints

 ******************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.StandardCategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.Dialgebras.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.CompositesAndInverses.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.EquivToAdjequiv.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfUnivCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Properties.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Properties.ClosedUnderInvertibles.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Import PseudoFunctor.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Identity.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Composition.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Biadjunction.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Preservation.Preservation.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Transformations.PseudoTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Modifications.Modification.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Inserters.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section BiadjunctionPreservation.
  Context {B₁ B₂ : bicat}
          {L : psfunctor B₁ B₂}
          (R : left_biadj_data L).

  Section PreserveInsertersCommute.
    Context {y₁ y₂ : B₂}
            (f : y₁ --> y₂)
            (x : B₁).

    Definition inserter_commute_nat_trans_data
      : nat_trans_data
          (biadj_right_hom R x y₁ ∙ post_comp x (# R f))
          (post_comp (L x) f ∙ biadj_right_hom R x y₂)
      := λ h, rassociator _ _ _ • (_ ◃ psfunctor_comp R _ _).

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
is_nat_trans
  (biadj_right_hom R x y₁ ∙ post_comp x (# R f))
  (post_comp (L x) f ∙ biadj_right_hom R x y₂)
  inserter_commute_nat_trans_data

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
is_nat_trans
  (biadj_right_hom R x y₁ ∙ post_comp x (# R f))
  (post_comp (L x) f ∙ biadj_right_hom R x y₂)
  inserter_commute_nat_trans_data

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom (L x) y₁
α: hom (L x) y₁ ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
((biadj_unit R x ◃ ## R α) ▹ # R f)
• inserter_commute_nat_trans_data h₂ =
inserter_commute_nat_trans_data h₁
• (biadj_unit R x ◃ ## R (α ▹ f))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom (L x) y₁
α: hom (L x) y₁ ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
((biadj_unit R x ◃ ## R α) ▹ # R f)
• (rassociator (biadj_unit R x) (# R h₂) (# R f)
   • (biadj_unit R x ◃ psfunctor_comp R h₂ f)) =
(rassociator (biadj_unit R x) (# R h₁) (# R f)
 • (biadj_unit R x ◃ psfunctor_comp R h₁ f))
• (biadj_unit R x ◃ ## R (α ▹ f))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom (L x) y₁
α: hom (L x) y₁ ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
(((biadj_unit R x ◃ ## R α) ▹ # R f)
 • rassociator (biadj_unit R x) (# R h₂) (# R f))
• (biadj_unit R x ◃ psfunctor_comp R h₂ f) =
(rassociator (biadj_unit R x) (# R h₁) (# R f)
 • (biadj_unit R x ◃ psfunctor_comp R h₁ f))
• (biadj_unit R x ◃ ## R (α ▹ f))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom (L x) y₁
α: hom (L x) y₁ ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
(rassociator (biadj_unit R x) (# R h₁) (# R f)
 • (biadj_unit R x ◃ (## R α ▹ # R f)))
• (biadj_unit R x ◃ psfunctor_comp R h₂ f) =
(rassociator (biadj_unit R x) (# R h₁) (# R f)
 • (biadj_unit R x ◃ psfunctor_comp R h₁ f))
• (biadj_unit R x ◃ ## R (α ▹ f))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom (L x) y₁
α: hom (L x) y₁ ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
rassociator (biadj_unit R x) (# R h₁) (# R f)
• ((biadj_unit R x ◃ (## R α ▹ # R f))
   • (biadj_unit R x ◃ psfunctor_comp R h₂ f)) =
rassociator (biadj_unit R x) (# R h₁) (# R f)
• ((biadj_unit R x ◃ psfunctor_comp R h₁ f)
   • (biadj_unit R x ◃ ## R (α ▹ f)))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom (L x) y₁
α: hom (L x) y₁ ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
(biadj_unit R x ◃ (## R α ▹ # R f))
• (biadj_unit R x ◃ psfunctor_comp R h₂ f) =
(biadj_unit R x ◃ psfunctor_comp R h₁ f)
• (biadj_unit R x ◃ ## R (α ▹ f))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom (L x) y₁
α: hom (L x) y₁ ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
biadj_unit R x
◃ ((## R α ▹ # R f) • psfunctor_comp R h₂ f) =
biadj_unit R x
◃ (psfunctor_comp R h₁ f • ## R (α ▹ f))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom (L x) y₁
α: hom (L x) y₁ ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
(## R α ▹ # R f) • psfunctor_comp R h₂ f =
psfunctor_comp R h₁ f • ## R (α ▹ f)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom (L x) y₁
α: hom (L x) y₁ ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
psfunctor_comp R h₁ f • ## R (α ▹ f) =
(## R α ▹ # R f) • psfunctor_comp R h₂ f

      apply psfunctor_rwhisker.
    Qed.

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
biadj_right_hom R x y₁ ∙ post_comp x (# R f)
⟹ post_comp (L x) f ∙ biadj_right_hom R x y₂

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
biadj_right_hom R x y₁ ∙ post_comp x (# R f)
⟹ post_comp (L x) f ∙ biadj_right_hom R x y₂

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
nat_trans_data
  (biadj_right_hom R x y₁ ∙ post_comp x (# R f))
  (post_comp (L x) f ∙ biadj_right_hom R x y₂)
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
is_nat_trans
  (biadj_right_hom R x y₁ ∙ post_comp x (# R f))
  (post_comp (L x) f ∙ biadj_right_hom R x y₂) ?t

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
nat_trans_data
  (biadj_right_hom R x y₁ ∙ post_comp x (# R f))
  (post_comp (L x) f ∙ biadj_right_hom R x y₂)
 exact inserter_commute_nat_trans_data.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
is_nat_trans
  (biadj_right_hom R x y₁ ∙ post_comp x (# R f))
  (post_comp (L x) f ∙ biadj_right_hom R x y₂)
  inserter_commute_nat_trans_data
 exact inserter_commute_is_nat_trans.
    Defined.

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
nat_z_iso
  (biadj_right_hom R x y₁ ∙ post_comp x (# R f))
  (post_comp (L x) f ∙ biadj_right_hom R x y₂)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
nat_z_iso
  (biadj_right_hom R x y₁ ∙ post_comp x (# R f))
  (post_comp (L x) f ∙ biadj_right_hom R x y₂)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
biadj_right_hom R x y₁ ∙ post_comp x (# R f)
⟹ post_comp (L x) f ∙ biadj_right_hom R x y₂
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
is_nat_z_iso ?μ

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
biadj_right_hom R x y₁ ∙ post_comp x (# R f)
⟹ post_comp (L x) f ∙ biadj_right_hom R x y₂
 exact inserter_commute_nat_trans.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
is_nat_z_iso inserter_commute_nat_trans
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
h: hom (L x) y₁
is_z_isomorphism (inserter_commute_nat_trans h)

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
h: hom (L x) y₁
is_invertible_2cell (inserter_commute_nat_trans h)

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
h: hom (L x) y₁
is_invertible_2cell
  (rassociator (biadj_unit R x) (# R h) (# R f)
   • (biadj_unit R x ◃ psfunctor_comp R h f))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x: B₁
h: hom (L x) y₁
is_invertible_2cell (psfunctor_comp R h f)

        apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
    Defined.
  End PreserveInsertersCommute.

  Section PreserveInserterNatIso.
    Context {y₁ y₂ : B₂}
            {f g : y₁ --> y₂}
            (i : inserter_cone f g)
            (x : B₁).

    Definition right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_cell
               (h : x --> R i)
      : biadj_unit R x · # R (# L h · biadj_counit R i · inserter_cone_pr1 i)
        ==>
        h · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
      := (_ ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R _ _)^-1
               • ((psfunctor_comp R _ _)^-1 ▹ _)))
         • lassociator _ _ _
         • (lassociator _ _ _ ▹ _)
         • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h) ▹ _) ▹ _)
         • rassociator _ _ _
         • rassociator _ _ _
         • (_ ◃ (lassociator _ _ _
                 • ((linvunitor _
                 • (_ ◃ (_ ◃ (linvunitor _ • (_ ◃ rinvunitor _))))
                 • invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_r R) i) ▹ _)
                 • lunitor _)).

    Opaque psfunctor_comp.

    Local Notation "'lα'" := (lassociator _ _ _).
    Local Notation "'rα'" := (rassociator _ _ _).
    Local Notation "'lu'" := (lunitor _).
    Local Notation "'lui'" := (linvunitor _).
    Local Notation "'ru'" := (runitor _).
    Local Notation "'rui'" := (rinvunitor _).

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
dialgebra_mor_path (post_comp x (# R f))
  (post_comp x (# R g))
  (right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_cell h)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
dialgebra_mor_path (post_comp x (# R f))
  (post_comp x (# R g))
  (right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_cell h)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
pr2
  (((biadj_left_hom R x i
     ∙ inserter_cone_functor i (L x))
    ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
        (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso f x)
        (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso g x)) h)
· # (post_comp x (# R g))
    (right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_cell h) =
# (post_comp x (# R f))
  (right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_cell h)
· pr2
    (inserter_cone_functor
       (psfunctor_inserter_cone R i) x h)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((inserter_commute_nat_trans_data f x
    (# L h · biadj_counit R i · inserter_cone_pr1 i)
  • (biadj_unit R x
     ◃ ## R
         ((rα
           • (# L h · biadj_counit R i
              ◃ inserter_cone_cell i)) • lα)))
 • ((biadj_unit R x
     ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
          (# L h · biadj_counit R i
           · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1) • lα))
• (right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_cell h
   ▹ # R g) =
(right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_cell h
 ▹ # R f)
• ((rα
    • (h
       ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f
           • ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
          • (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g)
            ^-1))) • lα)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(((rα
   • (biadj_unit R x
      ◃ psfunctor_comp R
          (# L h · biadj_counit R i
           · inserter_cone_pr1 i) f))
  • (biadj_unit R x
     ◃ ## R
         ((rα
           • (# L h · biadj_counit R i
              ◃ inserter_cone_cell i)) • lα)))
 • ((biadj_unit R x
     ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
          (# L h · biadj_counit R i
           · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1) • lα))
• (right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_cell h
   ▹ # R g) =
(right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_cell h
 ▹ # R f)
• ((rα
    • (h
       ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f
           • ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
          • (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g)
            ^-1))) • lα)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(((rα
   • (biadj_unit R x
      ◃ psfunctor_comp R
          (# L h · biadj_counit R i
           · inserter_cone_pr1 i) f))
  • (biadj_unit R x
     ◃ ## R
         ((rα
           • (# L h · biadj_counit R i
              ◃ inserter_cone_cell i)) • lα)))
 • ((biadj_unit R x
     ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
          (# L h · biadj_counit R i
           · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1) • lα))
• ((((((((biadj_unit R x
          ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R
                (# L h · biadj_counit (...) i)
                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1
             • ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                   (biadj_counit ... i)) ^-1
                ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))) • lα)
        • (lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
       • ((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
           ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) • rα) • rα)
    • (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
       ◃ ((lα
           • (((lui
                • (id₁ (pr1 R i)
                   ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                                (...) (...))) i
                      ◃ (lui • (id₁ ... ◃ rui)))))
               • invertible_modcomponent_of
                   (biadj_triangle_r R) i)
              ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) • lu)))
   ▹ # R g) =
((((((((biadj_unit R x
        ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R
              (# L h · biadj_counit (...) i)
              (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1
           • ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                 (biadj_counit ... i)) ^-1
              ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))) • lα)
      • (lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
     • ((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
         ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) • rα) • rα)
  • (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
     ◃ ((lα
         • (((lui
              • (id₁ (pr1 R i)
                 ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                              (...) (...))) i
                    ◃ (lui • (id₁ ... ◃ rui)))))

       (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1) ▹ # R g)
• (((biadj_unit R x
     ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
           (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) ▹ # R g)

         • ((((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
               ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
              ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R g)
            • ((rα ▹ # R g)
               • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                  • ((((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα)
                       ▹ # R g)
                      • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                          ◃ (((...) • (...))
                             • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                                  ... i ▹ # R ...)))
                         ▹ # R g))
                     • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu)
                        ▹ # R g)))))))) = ?t2

• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ psfunctor_comp R
        (# L h · biadj_counit R i
         · inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)

                         ▹ # R g)

                              ▹ # R ...)
                             ▹ # R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                            ▹ # R g)

                              • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =

         ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
              (# L h · biadj_counit (...) i)

          ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g)

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
  • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
      ◃ (((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
          • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
               ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                            (...) (...))) i ◃ lui))
              ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
             • ((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                 ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                              (...) (...))) i
                    ◃ (id₁ (... i) ◃ rui)))
                ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))
         • (invertible_modcomponent_of
              (biadj_triangle_r R) i
            ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))) ▹ # R f))
 • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f))
• ((rα
    • (((h ◃ psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
        • (h ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i)))
       • (h
          ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g)
            ^-1))) • lα) = ?t2

((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
• (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
     ◃ (((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
         • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
              ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                           (pr1 R) (biadj_unit (...))))
                   i ◃ lui))
             ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
            • ((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                             (pr1 R)

               ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))
        • (invertible_modcomponent_of
             (biadj_triangle_r R) i
           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))) ▹ # R f)
   • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
      • ((rα
          • (((h
               ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                   (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
              • (h ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i)))
             • (h
                ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                     (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)))
         • lα))) = ?t2

                  • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα)
                      ▹ # R f)
                     • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                          ◃ (((...) • (...))
                             • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                                  ... i ▹ # R ...)))
                         ▹ # R f)
                        • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                             ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
                           • (rα
                              • ((h
                                  ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                                      ... f)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
  ◃ (((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
      • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
           ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker (pr1 R)
                        (biadj_unit (pr1 R)))) i ◃ lui))
          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
         • ((id₁ (pr1 R i)
             ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                          (pr1 R) (biadj_unit (pr1 R))))
                  i
                ◃ (id₁
                     ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor (...)
                                (...))) i) ◃ rui)))
            ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))
     • (invertible_modcomponent_of
          (biadj_triangle_r R) i
        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))) ▹ # R f)
• (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
   • (rα
      • ((h ◃ psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
         • ((h ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
            • ((h
                ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                     (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
               • lα))))) = ?t2

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂

f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
 ◃ (((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
     • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
          ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker (pr1 R)
                       (biadj_unit (pr1 R)))) i ◃ lui))
         ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
        • ((id₁ (pr1 R i)
            ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                         (pr1 R) (biadj_unit (pr1 R))))
                 i
               ◃ (id₁
                    ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
                               (comp_psfunctor (...) L)
                               (pr1 R))) i) ◃ rui)))
           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))
    • (invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_r R)
         i ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))) ▹ # R f =
?y'

f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
      ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker (pr1 R)
                   (biadj_unit (pr1 R)))) i ◃ lui))
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))

                     (biadj_unit (pr1 R)))) i
           ◃ (id₁
                ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
                           (comp_psfunctor (pr1 R) L)
                           (pr1 R))) i) ◃ rui)))
       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))

   ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) = ?t2

(((id₁ (pr1 R i)
   ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker (pr1 R)
                (biadj_unit (pr1 R)))) i ◃ lui))
  ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
 • ((id₁ (pr1 R i)

   ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) = ?t2

        apply vassocl.

  ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
       (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1) ▹ # R f)

           (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1

                         ▹ # R f)

                              • ((h

                                      ... f)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
rα

    ◃ psfunctor_comp R

?b

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(is_invertible_2cell_rassociator (biadj_unit R x)
   (# R
      (# L h · biadj_counit R i · inserter_cone_pr1 i))
   (# R f)) ^-1
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
         (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
         (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1) ▹ # R f) = ?y'

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
?y' =
(is_invertible_2cell_rassociator (biadj_unit R x)
   (# R
      (# L h · biadj_counit R i · inserter_cone_pr1 i))
   (# R f)) ^-1
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
         (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
         (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1) ▹ # R f)

        apply rwhisker_lwhisker.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((biadj_unit R x
  ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R
        (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
        (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1 ▹ # R f)) • lα)
• (((biadj_unit R x
     ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
           (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) ▹ # R f)
   • ((lα ▹ # R f)
      • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
         • ((((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
               ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
              ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
            • ((rα ▹ # R f)
               • ((rα ▹ # R f)
                  • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα)
                      ▹ # R f)
                     • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                          ◃ ((lui ▹ # R ...)
                             • ((...) • (...))))
                         ▹ # R f)
                        • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                             ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
                           • (rα
                              • ((h
                                  ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                                      ... f)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ psfunctor_comp R
     (# L h · biadj_counit R i · inserter_cone_pr1 i)
     f)
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ ## R
        (rα
         • ((# L h · biadj_counit R i
             ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • lα)))
   • ((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
            (# L h · biadj_counit R i
             · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
      • (lα
         • (((biadj_unit R x
              ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                   (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                   (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1) ▹ # R g)
            • (((biadj_unit R x
                 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
                    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                ▹ # R g)
               • ((lα ▹ # R g)
                  • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((((psnaturality_of
                             (biadj_unit R) h
                           ▹ # R (biadj_counit ... i))
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                         ▹ # R g)
                        • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                           • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                              • (((...) ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
       (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1 ▹ # R f))
• (lα
   • (((biadj_unit R x
        ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
              (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) ▹ # R f)
      • ((lα ▹ # R f)
         • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
            • ((((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
                  ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
                 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
               • ((rα ▹ # R f)
                  • ((rα ▹ # R f)
                     • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα)
                         ▹ # R f)
                        • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                             ◃ ((...) • (...)))
                            ▹ # R f)
                           • (((# ... h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
                              • (rα • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ psfunctor_comp R
     (# L h · biadj_counit R i · inserter_cone_pr1 i)
     f)
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ ## R
        (rα
         • ((# L h · biadj_counit R i
             ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • lα)))
   • ((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
            (# L h · biadj_counit R i
             · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
      • (lα
         • (((biadj_unit R x
              ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                   (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                   (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1) ▹ # R g)
            • (((biadj_unit R x
                 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
                    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                ▹ # R g)
               • ((lα ▹ # R g)
                  • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((((psnaturality_of
                             (biadj_unit R) h
                           ▹ # R (biadj_counit ... i))
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                         ▹ # R g)
                        • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                           • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                              • (((...) ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂

(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
       (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1 ▹ # R f))
• (lα
   • (((biadj_unit R x
        ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
              (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) ▹ # R f)
      • ((lα ▹ # R f)
         • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
            • ((((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
                  ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
                 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
               • ((rα ▹ # R f)
                  • ((rα ▹ # R f)
                     • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα)
                         ▹ # R f)
                        • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                             ◃ ((...) • (...)))
                            ▹ # R f)
                           • (((# ... h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
                              • (rα • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b

     (# L h · biadj_counit R i · inserter_cone_pr1 i)
     f)
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ ## R

             ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • lα)))
   • ((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ (psfunctor_comp R

               • ((lα ▹ # R g)
                  • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((((psnaturality_of
                             (biadj_unit R) h
                           ▹ # R (biadj_counit ... i))
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                         ▹ # R g)
                        • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                           • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                              • (((...) ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

lα
• (((biadj_unit R x
     ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
           (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) ▹ # R f)
   • ((lα ▹ # R f)
      • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
         • ((((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
               ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
              ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)

                      ▹ # R f)
                     • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                          ◃ ((lui ▹ # R ...)
                             • ((...) • (...))))
                         ▹ # R f)
                        • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                             ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
                           • (rα

                                      ... f)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(lα
 • ((biadj_unit R x
     ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
           (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) ▹ # R f))
• ((lα ▹ # R f)
   • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
      • ((((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
            ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
         • ((rα ▹ # R f)
            • ((rα ▹ # R f)
               • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα)
                   ▹ # R f)
                  • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                       ◃ ((lui
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (((...) ▹ # R ...)
                             • ((...) • (...)))))
                      ▹ # R f)
                     • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu)
                         ▹ # R f)
                        • (rα
                           • ((h
                               ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                                   (inserter_cone_pr1
                                      i) f)
                              • ((h ◃ ## R ...)
                                 • ((...) • lα)))))))))))) =
?t2

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L

f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
lα
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
          (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) ▹ # R f) = ?y'

        apply rwhisker_lwhisker.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
       (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1 ▹ # R f))
• (((biadj_unit R x
     ◃ (((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
            (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
         ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)) • lα)
   • ((lα ▹ # R f)
      • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
         • ((((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
               ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
              ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
            • ((rα ▹ # R f)
               • ((rα ▹ # R f)
                  • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα)
                      ▹ # R f)
                     • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                          ◃ ((lui ▹ # R ...)
                             • ((...) • (...))))
                         ▹ # R f)
                        • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                             ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
                           • (rα
                              • ((h
                                  ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                                      ... f)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ psfunctor_comp R
     (# L h · biadj_counit R i · inserter_cone_pr1 i)
     f)
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ ## R
        (rα
         • ((# L h · biadj_counit R i
             ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • lα)))
   • ((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
            (# L h · biadj_counit R i
             · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
      • (lα
         • (((biadj_unit R x
              ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                   (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                   (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1) ▹ # R g)
            • (((biadj_unit R x
                 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
                    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                ▹ # R g)
               • ((lα ▹ # R g)
                  • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((((psnaturality_of
                             (biadj_unit R) h
                           ▹ # R (biadj_counit ... i))
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                         ▹ # R g)
                        • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                           • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                              • (((...) ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((biadj_unit R x
  ◃ (((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
         (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
      ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)) • lα)
• ((lα ▹ # R f)
   • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
      • ((((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
            ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
         • ((rα ▹ # R f)
            • ((rα ▹ # R f)
               • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα)
                   ▹ # R f)
                  • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                       ◃ ((lui
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (((...) ▹ # R ...)
                             • ((...) • (...)))))
                      ▹ # R f)
                     • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu)
                         ▹ # R f)
                        • (rα
                           • ((h
                               ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                                   (inserter_cone_pr1
                                      i) f)
                              • ((h ◃ ## R ...)
                                 • ((...) • lα)))))))))))) =
?t2

        apply vassocl.

                                 • ((...) • lα))))))))))))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h) (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f))
• ((is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (biadj_unit R x)
      (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (# R f)
         (is_invertible_2cell_inv
            (psfunctor_comp R
               (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
               (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))) ^-1
   • ((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ psfunctor_comp R
           (# L h · biadj_counit R i
            · inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
      • ((biadj_unit R x
          ◃ ## R
              (rα
               • ((# L h · biadj_counit R i
                   ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • lα)))
         • ((biadj_unit R x
             ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                  (# L h · biadj_counit R i
                   · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
            • (lα
               • (((biadj_unit R x
                    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                         (# L h
                          · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                         (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1)
                   ▹ # R g)
                  • (((biadj_unit R x
                       ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                             (biadj_counit ... i)) ^-1
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((lα ▹ # R g)
                        • (((lα
                             ▹ # R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                            ▹ # R g)
                           • ((((...) ▹ # R ...)
                               ▹ # R g)
                              • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
?b =
lα
• ((lα ▹ # R f)
   • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
      • ((((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
            ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
         • ((rα ▹ # R f)
            • ((rα ▹ # R f)
               • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα)
                   ▹ # R f)
                  • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                       ◃ ((lui
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (((...) ▹ # R ...)
                             • ((...) • (...)))))
                      ▹ # R f)
                     • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu)
                         ▹ # R f)
                        • (rα
                           • ((h
                               ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                                   (inserter_cone_pr1
                                      i) f)
                              • ((h ◃ ## R ...)
                                 • ((...) • lα))))))))))))

        apply idpath.

lα
• ((lα ▹ # R f)
   • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)

R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
?b =
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h) (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f))
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
         (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
         (inserter_cone_pr1 i) ▹ # R f))
   • ((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ psfunctor_comp R
           (# L h · biadj_counit R i
            · inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
      • ((biadj_unit R x
          ◃ ## R
              (rα
               • ((# L h · biadj_counit R i
                   ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • lα)))
         • ((biadj_unit R x
             ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                  (# L h · biadj_counit R i
                   · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
            • (lα
               • (((biadj_unit R x
                    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                         (# L h
                          · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                         (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1)
                   ▹ # R g)
                  • (((biadj_unit R x
                       ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                             (biadj_counit ... i)) ^-1
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((lα ▹ # R g)
                        • (((lα
                             ▹ # R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                            ▹ # R g)
                           • ((((...) ▹ # R ...)
                               ▹ # R g)
                              • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
lα
• ((lα ▹ # R f)
   • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
      • ((((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
            ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
         • ((rα ▹ # R f)
            • ((rα ▹ # R f)
               • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα)
                   ▹ # R f)
                  • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                       ◃ ((lui
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (((...) ▹ # R ...)
                             • ((...) • (...)))))
                      ▹ # R f)
                     • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu)
                         ▹ # R f)
                        • (rα
                           • ((h
                               ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                                   (inserter_cone_pr1
                                      i) f)
                              • ((h ◃ ## R ...)
                                 • ((...) • lα)))))))))))) =
?b

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
   ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
  ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
• ((rα ▹ # R f)
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
              ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
             ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
               • (rα
                  • ((h
                      ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                          (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
                     • ((h
                         ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
                        • ((h
                            ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                                 g) ^-1) • lα))))))))) =
?t2

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
    ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
   ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
 • (rα ▹ # R f))
• ((rα ▹ # R f)
   • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
           ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
              • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                   ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                                (...) (...))) i ◃ lui))
                  ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i
                         ◃ (id₁ ... ◃ rui)))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                         (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
          ▹ # R f)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
            • (rα
               • ((h
                   ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                       (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
                  • ((h ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
                     • ((h
                         ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                              (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g)
                           ^-1) • lα)))))))) = ?t2

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
   ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
  ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f) • (rα ▹ # R f) =
?y'

?b

          apply rwhisker_vcomp.

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
   ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
  ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) • rα) ▹ # R f = ?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
  ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) • rα = ?t2

          apply rwhisker_rwhisker_alt.
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(rα
 • (psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
    ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
      · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) ▹ # R f = ?y'

        exact (!(rwhisker_vcomp _ _ _)).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
lα
• ((lα ▹ # R f)
   • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
      • (((rα ▹ # R f)
          • ((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
              ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f))
         • ((rα ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
               • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                    ◃ ((lui
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (((...) ▹ # R ...)
                             • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                                  ... i ▹ # R ...)))))
                   ▹ # R f)
                  • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu)
                      ▹ # R f)
                     • (rα
                        • ((h
                            ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                                f)
                           • ((h
                               ◃ ## R
                                   (inserter_cone_cell
                                      i))
                              • ((h ◃ ... ^-1) • lα))))))))))) =
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h) (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f))
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
         (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
         (inserter_cone_pr1 i) ▹ # R f))
   • ((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ psfunctor_comp R
           (# L h · biadj_counit R i
            · inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
      • ((biadj_unit R x
          ◃ ## R
              (rα
               • ((# L h · biadj_counit R i
                   ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • lα)))
         • ((biadj_unit R x
             ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                  (# L h · biadj_counit R i
                   · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
            • (lα
               • (((biadj_unit R x
                    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                         (# L h
                          · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                         (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1)
                   ▹ # R g)
                  • (((biadj_unit R x
                       ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                             (biadj_counit ... i)) ^-1
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((lα ▹ # R g)
                        • (((lα
                             ▹ # R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                            ▹ # R g)
                           • ((((...) ▹ # R ...)
                               ▹ # R g)
                              • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
lα
• ((lα ▹ # R f)
   • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
      • (((rα ▹ # R f)
          • ((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
              ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f))
         • ((rα ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
               • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                    ◃ ((lui
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (((...) ▹ # R ...)
                             • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                                  ... i ▹ # R ...)))))
                   ▹ # R f)
                  • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu)
                      ▹ # R f)
                     • (rα
                        • ((h
                            ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                                f)
                           • ((h
                               ◃ ## R
                                   (inserter_cone_cell
                                      i))
                              • ((h ◃ ... ^-1) • lα))))))))))) =
?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
?b =
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h) (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f))
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
         (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
         (inserter_cone_pr1 i) ▹ # R f))
   • ((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ psfunctor_comp R
           (# L h · biadj_counit R i
            · inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
      • ((biadj_unit R x
          ◃ ## R
              (rα
               • ((# L h · biadj_counit R i
                   ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • lα)))
         • ((biadj_unit R x
             ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                  (# L h · biadj_counit R i
                   · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
            • (lα
               • (((biadj_unit R x
                    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                         (# L h
                          · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                         (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1)
                   ▹ # R g)
                  • (((biadj_unit R x
                       ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                             (biadj_counit ... i)) ^-1
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((lα ▹ # R g)
                        • (((lα
                             ▹ # R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                            ▹ # R g)
                           • ((((...) ▹ # R ...)
                               ▹ # R g)
                              • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
lα
• ((lα ▹ # R f)
   • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
      • (((rα ▹ # R f)
          • ((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
              ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f))
         • ((rα ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
               • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                    ◃ ((lui
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (((...) ▹ # R ...)
                             • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                                  ... i ▹ # R ...)))))
                   ▹ # R f)
                  • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu)
                      ▹ # R f)
                     • (rα
                        • ((h
                            ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                                f)
                           • ((h
                               ◃ ## R
                                   (inserter_cone_cell
                                      i))
                              • ((h ◃ ... ^-1) • lα))))))))))) =
?b

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((rα ▹ # R f)
 • ((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
     ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
       · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f))
• ((rα ▹ # R f)
   • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
           ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
              • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                   ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                                (...) (...))) i ◃ lui))
                  ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i
                         ◃ (id₁ ... ◃ rui)))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                         (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
          ▹ # R f)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
            • (rα
               • ((h
                   ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                       (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
                  • ((h ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
                     • ((h
                         ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                              (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g)
                           ^-1) • lα)))))))) = ?t2

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(rα ▹ # R f)
• (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
     ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
       · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
              ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
             ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
               • (rα
                  • ((h
                      ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                          (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
                     • ((h
                         ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
                        • ((h
                            ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                                 g) ^-1) • lα))))))))) =
?t2

        apply idpath.

              ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)

                   ▹ # R f)
                  • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                       ◃ ((lui
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (((...) ▹ # R ...)

                      ▹ # R f)

                         ▹ # R f)
                        • (rα
                           • ((h
                               ◃ psfunctor_comp R

                              • ((h ◃ ## R ...)
                                 • ((...) • lα)))))))))))) =
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h) (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f))
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
         (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
         (inserter_cone_pr1 i) ▹ # R f))
   • ((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ psfunctor_comp R
           (# L h · biadj_counit R i
            · inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
      • ((biadj_unit R x
          ◃ ## R
              (rα
               • ((# L h · biadj_counit R i
                   ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • lα)))
         • ((biadj_unit R x
             ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                  (# L h · biadj_counit R i
                   · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
            • (lα
               • (((biadj_unit R x
                    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                         (# L h
                          · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                         (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1)
                   ▹ # R g)
                  • (((biadj_unit R x
                       ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                             (biadj_counit ... i)) ^-1
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((lα ▹ # R g)
                        • (((lα
                             ▹ # R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                            ▹ # R g)
                           • ((((...) ▹ # R ...)
                               ▹ # R g)
                              • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f))
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R

   • ((biadj_unit R x

                    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                         (# L h

                   ▹ # R g)

                       ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                             (biadj_counit ... i)) ^-1
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((lα ▹ # R g)
                        • (((lα
                             ▹ # R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                            ▹ # R g)
                           • ((((...) ▹ # R ...)
                               ▹ # R g)
                              • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
lα
• ((lα ▹ # R f)
   • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
      • ((rα ▹ # R f)
         • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
              ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
            • ((rα ▹ # R f)
               • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα)
                   ▹ # R f)
                  • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                       ◃ ((lui
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (((...) ▹ # R ...)

                      ▹ # R f)

                               ◃ psfunctor_comp R

                                      i) f)
                              • ((h ◃ ## R ...)
                                 • ((...) • lα))))))))))))

     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f))
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
         (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
         (inserter_cone_pr1 i) ▹ # R f))
   • ((biadj_unit R x

      • ((biadj_unit R x

                   ▹ # R g)
                  • (((biadj_unit R x

                             (biadj_counit ... i)) ^-1
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((lα ▹ # R g)
                        • (((lα
                             ▹ # R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                            ▹ # R g)
                           • ((((...) ▹ # R ...)
                               ▹ # R g)
                              • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ ## R
     (rα
      • ((# L h · biadj_counit R i
          ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • lα)))
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
         (# L h · biadj_counit R i
          · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
   • (lα
      • (((biadj_unit R x
           ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1) ▹ # R g)
         • (((biadj_unit R x
              ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                    (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
                 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) ▹ # R g)
            • ((lα ▹ # R g)
               • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                   ▹ # R g)
                  • ((((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R)
                          h
                        ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
                       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                        • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                           • (((# ... h ◃ lα) ▹ # R g)
                              • (((...) ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) ▹ # R g)))))))))))) =
?t2

y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
biadj_unit R x
◃ ## R
    (rα
     • ((# L h · biadj_counit R i
         ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • lα)) = ?y'

          apply psfunctor_vcomp.
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L

f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

◃ (## R rα
   • ## R
       ((# L h · biadj_counit R i
         ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • lα)) = ?y'

        exact (!(lwhisker_vcomp _ _ _)).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h) (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f))
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
         (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
         (inserter_cone_pr1 i) ▹ # R f))
   • ((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ psfunctor_comp R
           (# L h · biadj_counit R i
            · inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
      • (((biadj_unit R x ◃ ## R rα)
          • (biadj_unit R x
             ◃ ## R
                 ((# L h · biadj_counit R i
                   ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • lα)))
         • ((biadj_unit R x
             ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                  (# L h · biadj_counit R i
                   · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
            • (lα
               • (((biadj_unit R x
                    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                         (# L h
                          · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                         (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1)
                   ▹ # R g)
                  • (((biadj_unit R x
                       ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                             (biadj_counit ... i)) ^-1
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((lα ▹ # R g)
                        • (((lα
                             ▹ # R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                            ▹ # R g)
                           • ((((...) ▹ # R ...)
                               ▹ # R g)
                              • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
lα
• ((lα ▹ # R f)
   • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
      • ((rα ▹ # R f)
         • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
              ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
            • ((rα ▹ # R f)
               • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα)
                   ▹ # R f)
                  • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                       ◃ ((lui
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (((...) ▹ # R ...)
                             • ((...) • (...)))))
                      ▹ # R f)
                     • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu)
                         ▹ # R f)
                        • (rα
                           • ((h
                               ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                                   (inserter_cone_pr1
                                      i) f)
                              • ((h ◃ ## R ...)
                                 • ((...) • lα))))))))))))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h) (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f))
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
         (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
         (inserter_cone_pr1 i) ▹ # R f))
   • ((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ psfunctor_comp R
           (# L h · biadj_counit R i
            · inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
      • (((biadj_unit R x ◃ ## R rα)
          • (biadj_unit R x
             ◃ ## R
                 ((# L h · biadj_counit R i
                   ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • lα)))
         • ((biadj_unit R x
             ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                  (# L h · biadj_counit R i
                   · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
            • (lα
               • (((biadj_unit R x
                    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                         (# L h
                          · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                         (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1)
                   ▹ # R g)
                  • (((biadj_unit R x
                       ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                             (biadj_counit ... i)) ^-1
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((lα ▹ # R g)
                        • (((lα
                             ▹ # R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                            ▹ # R g)
                           • ((((...) ▹ # R ...)
                               ▹ # R g)
                              • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
?b =
lα
• ((lα ▹ # R f)
   • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
      • ((rα ▹ # R f)
         • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
              ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
            • ((rα ▹ # R f)
               • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα)
                   ▹ # R f)
                  • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                       ◃ ((lui
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (((...) ▹ # R ...)
                             • ((...) • (...)))))
                      ▹ # R f)
                     • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu)
                         ▹ # R f)
                        • (rα
                           • ((h
                               ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                                   (inserter_cone_pr1
                                      i) f)
                              • ((h ◃ ## R ...)
                                 • ((...) • lα))))))))))))

                             (biadj_counit ... i)) ^-1

                     • ((lα ▹ # R g)

                            ▹ # R g)

((((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
          (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f))
   • (biadj_unit R x
      ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
           (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
           (inserter_cone_pr1 i) ▹ # R f)))
  • (biadj_unit R x
     ◃ psfunctor_comp R
         (# L h · biadj_counit R i
          · inserter_cone_pr1 i) f))
 • ((biadj_unit R x ◃ ## R rα)
    • (biadj_unit R x
       ◃ ## R

             ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • lα))))

    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R

   • (lα

                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1) ▹ # R g)
         • (((biadj_unit R x

                    (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
                 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) ▹ # R g)
            • ((lα ▹ # R g)
               • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                   ▹ # R g)
                  • ((((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R)
                          h
                        ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
                       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                        • ((rα ▹ # R g)

                              • (((...) ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) ▹ # R g)))))))))))) =
?b

  • (biadj_unit R x

f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
?b = ?t2

◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)

   • (psfunctor_comp R
        (# L h · biadj_counit R i
         · inserter_cone_pr1 i) f • ## R rα)) = ?b

lα
• ((lα ▹ # R f)
   • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
      • ((rα ▹ # R f)

                         ▹ # R g)

lα
• ((lα ▹ # R f)
   • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)

                                      i) f)

L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L

((biadj_unit R x
  ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (# L h) (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f))
 • ((biadj_unit R x
     ◃ (# R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
        ◃ psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f))
    • (biadj_unit R x
       ◃ psfunctor_comp R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
           (inserter_cone_pr1 i · f))))
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ ## R
        ((# L h · biadj_counit R i
          ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • lα))
   • ((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
            (# L h · biadj_counit R i
             · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
      • (lα
         • (((biadj_unit R x
              ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                   (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                   (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1) ▹ # R g)
            • (((biadj_unit R x
                 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
                    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                ▹ # R g)
               • ((lα ▹ # R g)
                  • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((((psnaturality_of
                             (biadj_unit R) h
                           ▹ # R (biadj_counit ... i))
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                         ▹ # R g)
                        • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                           • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                              • (((...) ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (biadj_unit R x)
   (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
      (# R (# L h) · # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
      (# R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) (# R f))) ^-1
• (lα
   • ((lα ▹ # R f)
      • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
         • ((rα ▹ # R f)
            • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
                 ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                   · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                ▹ # R f)
               • ((rα ▹ # R f)
                  • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα)
                      ▹ # R f)
                     • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                          ◃ ((lui ▹ # R ...)
                             • ((...) • (...))))
                         ▹ # R f)
                        • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                             ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
                           • (rα
                              • ((h
                                  ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                                      ... f)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(biadj_unit R x ◃ lα)
• (lα
   • ((lα ▹ # R f)
      • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
         • ((rα ▹ # R f)
            • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
                 ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                   · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                ▹ # R f)

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(((((biadj_unit R x ◃ lα) • lα) • (lα ▹ # R f))
  • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f))
 • (rα ▹ # R f))
• (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
     ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
       · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
              ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
             ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
               • (rα
                  • ((h
                      ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                          (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
                     • ((h
                         ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
                        • ((h
                            ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                                 g) ^-1) • lα))))))))) =
?b

((((biadj_unit R x ◃ lα) • lα) • (lα ▹ # R f))
 • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f))
• (rα ▹ # R f) = ?y'

          apply lassociator_lassociator.
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((lα • lα)
 • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f))
• (rα ▹ # R f) = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(lα
 • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
    • (lα • (rα ▹ # R f))))
• (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
     ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
       · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
              ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
             ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
               • (rα
                  • ((h
                      ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                          (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
                     • ((h
                         ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
                        • ((h
                            ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                                 g) ^-1) • lα))))))))) =
((biadj_unit R x
  ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (# L h) (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f))
 • ((biadj_unit R x
     ◃ (# R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
        ◃ psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f))
    • (biadj_unit R x
       ◃ psfunctor_comp R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
           (inserter_cone_pr1 i · f))))
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ ## R
        ((# L h · biadj_counit R i
          ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • lα))
   • ((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
            (# L h · biadj_counit R i
             · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
      • (lα
         • (((biadj_unit R x
              ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                   (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                   (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1) ▹ # R g)
            • (((biadj_unit R x
                 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
                    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                ▹ # R g)
               • ((lα ▹ # R g)
                  • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((((psnaturality_of
                             (biadj_unit R) h
                           ▹ # R (biadj_counit ... i))
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                         ▹ # R g)
                        • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                           • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                              • (((...) ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

               • ((lα ▹ # R g)

                     • ((((psnaturality_of
                             (biadj_unit R) h

(lα
 • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
    • (lα • (rα ▹ # R f))))
• (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
