   • ((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
            (# L h · biadj_counit R i
             · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
      • (lα
         • (((biadj_unit R x
              ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                   (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                   (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1) ▹ # R g)
            • (((biadj_unit R x
                 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
                    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                ▹ # R g)
               • ((lα ▹ # R g)
                  • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((((psnaturality_of
                             (biadj_unit R) h
                           ▹ # R (biadj_counit ... i))
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                         ▹ # R g)
                        • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                           • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                              • (((...) ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
?b =
(lα
 • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
    • (lα • (rα ▹ # R f))))
• (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
     ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
       · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
              ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
             ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
               • (rα
                  • ((h
                      ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                          (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
                     • ((h
                         ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
                        • ((h
                            ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                                 g) ^-1) • lα)))))))))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((biadj_unit R x
  ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (# L h) (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f))
 • ((biadj_unit R x
     ◃ (# R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
        ◃ psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f))
    • (biadj_unit R x
       ◃ psfunctor_comp R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
           (inserter_cone_pr1 i · f))))
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ (## R
         (# L h · biadj_counit R i
          ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • ## R lα))
   • ((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
            (# L h · biadj_counit R i
             · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
      • (lα
         • (((biadj_unit R x
              ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                   (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                   (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1) ▹ # R g)
            • (((biadj_unit R x
                 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
                    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                ▹ # R g)
               • ((lα ▹ # R g)
                  • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((((psnaturality_of
                             (biadj_unit R) h
                           ▹ # R (biadj_counit ... i))
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                         ▹ # R g)
                        • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                           • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                              • (((...) ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((biadj_unit R x
  ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (# L h) (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f))
 • ((biadj_unit R x
     ◃ (# R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
        ◃ psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f))
    • (biadj_unit R x
       ◃ psfunctor_comp R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
           (inserter_cone_pr1 i · f))))
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ (## R
         (# L h · biadj_counit R i
          ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • ## R lα))
   • ((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
            (# L h · biadj_counit R i
             · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
      • ((biadj_unit R x
          ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R
                (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1 ▹ # R g))
         • ((biadj_unit R x
             ◃ (((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                    (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
                 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R g))
            • (lα
               • ((lα ▹ # R g)
                  • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((((psnaturality_of
                             (biadj_unit R) h
                           ▹ # R (biadj_counit ... i))
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                         ▹ # R g)
                        • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                           • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                              • (((...) ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
(lα
 • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
    • (lα • (rα ▹ # R f))))
• (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
     ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
       · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
              ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
             ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
               • (rα
                  • ((h
                      ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                          (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
                     • ((h
                         ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
                        • ((h
                            ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                                 g) ^-1) • lα)))))))))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((biadj_unit R x
  ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (# L h) (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f))
 • ((biadj_unit R x
     ◃ (# R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
        ◃ psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f))
    • (biadj_unit R x
       ◃ psfunctor_comp R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
           (inserter_cone_pr1 i · f))))

   • ((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
            (# L h · biadj_counit R i
             · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
      • ((biadj_unit R x
          ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R
                (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1 ▹ # R g))
         • ((biadj_unit R x
             ◃ (((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                    (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
                 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R g))
            • (lα
               • ((lα ▹ # R g)
                  • (((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((((psnaturality_of
                             (biadj_unit R) h
                           ▹ # R (biadj_counit ... i))
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                         ▹ # R g)
                        • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                           • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                              • (((...) ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b

 • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)

• (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
     ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
       · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
              ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
             ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
               • (rα
                  • ((h
                      ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                          (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
                     • ((h
                         ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
                        • ((h
                            ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                                 g) ^-1) • lα)))))))))

          apply pentagon_6.

                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
                ▹ # R g)
               • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R g)))))) =
?t2

R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

x: B₁

(lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g)
• (lα
   • ((((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
         ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R g)

               • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                    ◃ ((lui
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (((...) ▹ # R ...)
                             • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                                  ... i ▹ # R ...)))))
                   ▹ # R g)
                  • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu)
                     ▹ # R g))))))) = ?t2

                 ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))

                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))

                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
   ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
  ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g) • lα)
• ((rα ▹ # R g)
   • ((rα ▹ # R g)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R g)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
              ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
             ▹ # R g)
            • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R g))))) =
?t2

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂

y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
  ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g)
• (lα
   • ((rα ▹ # R g)
      • ((rα ▹ # R g)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R g)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                 ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i) ◃ (... i ◃ lui))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                               (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                             ▹ # R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
                ▹ # R g)
               • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R g)))))) =

        apply idpath.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((biadj_unit R x
  ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (# L h) (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f))
 • ((biadj_unit R x
     ◃ (# R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
        ◃ psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f))
    • (biadj_unit R x
       ◃ psfunctor_comp R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
           (inserter_cone_pr1 i · f))))
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ (## R
         (# L h · biadj_counit R i
          ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • ## R lα))
   • ((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
            (# L h · biadj_counit R i
             · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
      • ((biadj_unit R x
          ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R
                (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1 ▹ # R g))
         • ((biadj_unit R x
             ◃ (((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                    (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
                 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R g))
            • ((biadj_unit R x ◃ rα)
               • (lα
                  • ((lα
                      ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                        · # R g)
                     • (((psnaturality_of
                            (biadj_unit R) h
                          ▹ # R
                              (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
                         ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                           · # R g)
                        • (lα
                           • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                              • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
(lα
 • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
    • (lα • (rα ▹ # R f))))
• (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
     ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
       · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
              ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
             ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
               • (rα
                  • ((h
                      ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                          (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
                     • ((h
                         ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
                        • ((h
                            ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                                 g) ^-1) • lα)))))))))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((biadj_unit R x
  ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (# L h) (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f))
 • ((biadj_unit R x
     ◃ (# R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
        ◃ psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f))
    • (biadj_unit R x
       ◃ psfunctor_comp R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
           (inserter_cone_pr1 i · f))))
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ (## R
         (# L h · biadj_counit R i
          ◃ inserter_cone_cell i) • ## R lα))
   • ((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
            (# L h · biadj_counit R i
             · inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
      • ((biadj_unit R x
          ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R
                (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1 ▹ # R g))
         • ((biadj_unit R x
             ◃ (((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                    (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
                 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R g))
            • ((biadj_unit R x ◃ rα)
               • (lα
                  • ((lα
                      ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                        · # R g)
                     • (((psnaturality_of
                            (biadj_unit R) h
                          ▹ # R
                              (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
                         ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                           · # R g)
                        • (lα
                           • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                              • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
?b =
(lα
 • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
    • (lα • (rα ▹ # R f))))
• (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
     ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
       · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
              ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
             ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
               • (rα
                  • ((h
                      ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                          (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
                     • ((h
                         ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
                        • ((h
                            ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                                 g) ^-1) • lα)))))))))

        ◃ psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f))
    • (biadj_unit R x

                 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R g))
            • ((biadj_unit R x ◃ rα)
               • (lα
                  • ((lα
                      ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                        · # R g)
                     • (((psnaturality_of
                            (biadj_unit R) h
                          ▹ # R
                              (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
                         ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                           · # R g)

    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R

          ◃ (((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                 (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
              ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R g))
         • ((biadj_unit R x ◃ rα)
            • (lα
               • ((lα
                   ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g)
                  • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R)
                         h
                       ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
                      ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                        · # R g)
                     • (lα
                        • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                           • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                              • (((...) ▹ # R g)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b

   • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g)
      • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
           ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g)
         • (lα
            • ((rα ▹ # R g)
               • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                  • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα)
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                          ◃ ((lui ▹ # R ...)
                             • ((...) • (...))))
                         ▹ # R g)
                        • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu)
                           ▹ # R g))))))))) = ?b

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((biadj_unit R x
  ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (# L h) (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f))
 • ((biadj_unit R x
     ◃ (# R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
        ◃ psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f))
    • (biadj_unit R x
       ◃ psfunctor_comp R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
           (inserter_cone_pr1 i · f))))
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ (## R
         (# L h · biadj_counit R i
          ◃ inserter_cone_cell i)
       • ((psfunctor_comp R
             (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
             (inserter_cone_pr1 i · g)) ^-1
          • ((# R (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
              ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                   (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
             • ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                   (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
                ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g)))))
   • (lα
      • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g)
         • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
              ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
             ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g)
            • (lα
               • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                  • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                     • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα)
                         ▹ # R g)
                        • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                             ◃ ((...) • (...)))
                            ▹ # R g)
                           • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                               ◃ lu) ▹ # R g)))))))))) =
(lα
 • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
    • (lα • (rα ▹ # R f))))
• (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
     ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
       · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
              ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
             ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
               • (rα
                  • ((h
                      ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                          (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
                     • ((h
                         ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
                        • ((h
                            ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                                 g) ^-1) • lα)))))))))

R: left_biadj_data L

((biadj_unit R x
  ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (# L h) (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f))
 • ((biadj_unit R x

        ◃ psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f))
    • (biadj_unit R x

   • (lα

         • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
              ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
             ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g)
            • (lα
               • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                  • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                     • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα)
                         ▹ # R g)
                        • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                             ◃ ((...) • (...)))
                            ▹ # R g)
                           • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                               ◃ lu) ▹ # R g)))))))))) =
?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
?b =
(lα
 • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
    • (lα • (rα ▹ # R f))))
• (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
     ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
       · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
              ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
             ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
               • (rα
                  • ((h
                      ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                          (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
                     • ((h
                         ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
                        • ((h
                            ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                                 g) ^-1) • lα)))))))))

h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((biadj_unit R x
  ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (# L h) (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f))
 • ((biadj_unit R x
     ◃ (# R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
        ◃ psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f))
    • (biadj_unit R x
       ◃ psfunctor_comp R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
           (inserter_cone_pr1 i · f))))

    ◃ (## R

       • ((psfunctor_comp R
             (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)

          • ((# R (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
              ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                   (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g) ^-1)
             • ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                   (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
                ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g)))))
   • (lα
      • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g)
         • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
              ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
             ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g)
            • (lα
               • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                  • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                     • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα)
                         ▹ # R g)
                        • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                             ◃ ((...) • (...)))
                            ▹ # R g)
                           • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                               ◃ lu) ▹ # R g)))))))))) =
?b

(((biadj_unit R x
   ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (# L h)

  • ((biadj_unit R x

             • ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                   (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
                ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g))))))
• (lα
   • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g)
      • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
           ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g)
         • (lα
            • ((rα ▹ # R g)
               • ((rα ▹ # R g)
                  • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα)
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                          ◃ ((lui ▹ # R ...)
                             • ((...) • (...))))
                         ▹ # R g)
                        • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu)
                           ▹ # R g))))))))) = ?b

            apply psfunctor_lwhisker.
          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((# R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
  ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
 • psfunctor_comp R (# L h · biadj_counit R i)
     (inserter_cone_pr1 i · g))
• ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
      (inserter_cone_pr1 i · g)) ^-1
   • ((# R (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)

• id₂
    (# R (# L h) · # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
     · (# R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g)) = ?t20

          apply id2_right.

                     • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu)
                        ▹ # R g)))))))) = ?b

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((biadj_unit R x
  · (# R (# L h) · # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
  ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f
     • (## R (inserter_cone_cell i)
        • (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g)
          ^-1)))
 • (lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g))
• (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
     ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g)
   • (lα
      • ((rα ▹ # R g)
         • ((rα ▹ # R g)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R g)
               • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                    ◃ ((lui
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (((...) ▹ # R ...)
                             • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                                  ... i ▹ # R ...)))))
                   ▹ # R g)
                  • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu)
                     ▹ # R g))))))) = ?b

f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(biadj_unit R x
 · (# R (# L h) · # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
 ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f
    • (## R (inserter_cone_cell i)
       • (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g)
         ^-1)))
• (lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g) = ?y'

        exact (!(vcomp_whisker _ _)).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
 • (biadj_unit R x · # R (# L h)
    · # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f
       • (## R (inserter_cone_cell i)
          • (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g)
            ^-1))))
• (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
     ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R g)
   • (lα
      • ((rα ▹ # R g)
         • ((rα ▹ # R g)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R g)
               • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                    ◃ ((lui
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (((...) ▹ # R ...)
                             • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                                  ... i ▹ # R ...)))))
                   ▹ # R g)
                  • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu)
                     ▹ # R g))))))) =
((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
 • (lα • (rα ▹ # R f)))
• (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
     ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
       · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
              ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
             ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
               • (rα
                  • ((h
                      ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                          (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
                     • ((h
                         ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
                        • ((h
                            ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                                 g) ^-1) • lα)))))))))

                        ▹ # R g)))))))) =
((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
 • (lα • (rα ▹ # R f)))
• (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
     ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
       · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
              ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))

                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))

                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))

                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
             ▹ # R f)

               • (rα
                  • ((h

                          (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)

                         ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))

                        ▹ # R g)))))))) =
(lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
• ((lα • (rα ▹ # R f))
   • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
        ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
          · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
      • ((rα ▹ # R f)

            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                 ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i) ◃ (... i ◃ lui))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))

                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))

                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
                ▹ # R f)

                   ▹ # R f)

                     • ((h
                         ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                             (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
                        • ((h
                            ◃ ## R
                                (inserter_cone_cell i))

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
   ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
  ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
 • (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h · biadj_unit R (R i)
    · # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f
       • (## R (inserter_cone_cell i)
          • (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g)
            ^-1))))
• (lα
   • ((rα ▹ # R g)
      • ((rα ▹ # R g)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R g)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                 ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i) ◃ (... i ◃ lui))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                               (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                             ▹ # R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
                ▹ # R g)
               • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R g)))))) =
(lα • (rα ▹ # R f))
• (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
     ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
       · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
              ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
             ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
               • (rα
                  • ((h
                      ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                          (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
                     • ((h
                         ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
                        • ((h
                            ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                                 g) ^-1) • lα)))))))))

((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
  ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
• ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h · biadj_unit R (R i)
    · # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f
       • (## R (inserter_cone_cell i)
          • (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g)
            ^-1)))
   • (lα
      • ((rα ▹ # R g)

               • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                    ◃ ((lui
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))

                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (((...) ▹ # R ...)
                             • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                                  ... i ▹ # R ...)))))
                   ▹ # R g)

                     ▹ # R g))))))) =

                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))

                                 g) ^-1) • lα)))))))))

 · # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
 ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f
    • (## R (inserter_cone_cell i)
       • (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g)
         ^-1)))
• (lα
   • ((rα ▹ # R g)
      • ((rα ▹ # R g)

            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                 ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))

                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))

                          • (invertible_modcomponent_of

                ▹ # R g)

                           ^-1) • lα)))))))) = ?b

• ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h · biadj_unit R (R i) ◃ lα)

• (lα
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)

                                  ... i ▹ # R ...)))))

              ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
             ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
               • (rα
                  • ((h
                      ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                          (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
                     • ((h
                         ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
                        • ((h
                            ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                                 g) ^-1) • lα)))))))))

      • ((rα ▹ # R g)
         • ((rα ▹ # R g)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R g)
               • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                    ◃ ((lui
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (((...) ▹ # R ...)
                             • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                                  ... i ▹ # R ...)))))
                   ▹ # R g)
                  • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu)
                     ▹ # R g))))))) = ?t2

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(lα ▹ # R g)
• ((rα ▹ # R g)
   • ((rα ▹ # R g)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R g)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
              ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
             ▹ # R g)
            • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R g))))) =
?t2

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
id₂
  (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h · biadj_unit R (R i)
   · (# R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
      · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) ▹ # R g = ?y'

          apply id2_rwhisker.
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
id₂
  (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h · biadj_unit R (R i)
   · (# R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
      · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) · # R g)
• ((rα ▹ # R g)
   • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R g)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
           ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
              • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                   ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                                (...) (...))) i ◃ lui))
                  ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i
                         ◃ (id₁ ... ◃ rui)))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                         (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
          ▹ # R g)
         • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R g)))) =
?t2

        apply id2_left.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(# (id_psfunctor B₁) h · biadj_unit R (R i)
 ◃ (# R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f
       • (## R (inserter_cone_cell i)
          • (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g)
            ^-1))))
• ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h · biadj_unit R (R i) ◃ lα)
   • (lα
      • ((rα ▹ # R g)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R g)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                 ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i) ◃ (... i ◃ lui))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                               (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                             ▹ # R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
                ▹ # R g)
               • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R g)))))) =
(# (id_psfunctor B₁) h · biadj_unit R (R i) ◃ lα)
• (lα
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
              ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
             ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
               • (rα
                  • ((h
                      ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                          (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
                     • ((h
                         ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
                        • ((h
                            ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                                 g) ^-1) • lα)))))))))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(# (id_psfunctor B₁) h · biadj_unit R (R i)
 ◃ (# R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f
       • (## R (inserter_cone_cell i)
          • (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g)
            ^-1))))
• ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h · biadj_unit R (R i) ◃ lα)
   • (lα
      • ((rα ▹ # R g)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R g)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                 ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))

                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                               (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                             ▹ # R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
                ▹ # R g)
               • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R g)))))) =
?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
?b =
(# (id_psfunctor B₁) h · biadj_unit R (R i) ◃ lα)
• (lα
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
              ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                 • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))
                     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
             ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)
               • (rα
                  • ((h
                      ◃ psfunctor_comp R
                          (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f)
                     • ((h
                         ◃ ## R (inserter_cone_cell i))
                        • ((h
                            ◃ (psfunctor_comp R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                                 g) ^-1) • lα)))))))))

x: B₁

 ◃ (# R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f
       • (## R (inserter_cone_cell i)
          • (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g)
            ^-1))))
• ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h · biadj_unit R (R i) ◃ lα)
   • (lα
      • ((rα ▹ # R g)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R g)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                 ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    • (((id₁ (pr1 R i) ◃ (... i ◃ lui))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       • (((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                               (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                             ▹ # R
                                 (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
                ▹ # R g)
               • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R g)))))) =
?b

                  i ◃ lui))
            ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
           • (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                             (pr1 R)
                             (biadj_unit (...)))) i
                   ◃ (id₁ ((pr111 (...)) i) ◃ rui)))
               ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
              • (invertible_modcomponent_of
                   (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))
    ▹ # R f)) • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f) =
?y'

                    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) • lu))))
         ▹ # R g))) = ?b

• (lα

          ◃ (lα
             • (((lui
                  • ((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                      ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i ◃ lui))
                     • ((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                         ◃ (... i ◃ (...)))
                        • invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i)))
                 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) • lu))))
      ▹ # R g)) = ?t2

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(# (id_psfunctor B₁) h · biadj_unit R (R i)
 ◃ (# R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) f
       • (## R (inserter_cone_cell i)
          • (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g)
            ^-1))))
• (lα
   • (lα
      • ((rα
          • (rα
             • (h
                ◃ (lα
                   • (((lui
                        • ((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           • ((...)
                              • invertible_modcomponent_of
                                  ... i)))
                       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                      • lu))))) ▹ # R g))) =
(# (id_psfunctor B₁) h · biadj_unit R (R i) ◃ lα)
• (lα
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (rα
         • ((h
             ◃ ((lα ▹ # R f)
                • (((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                    ▹ # R f)
                   • ((((id₁ (pr1 R i) ◃ (... i ◃ lui))
                        ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                       ▹ # R f)
                      • ((((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
                          ▹ # R f)
                         • (((invertible_modcomponent_of
                                ... i ▹ # R ...)
                             ▹ # R f)
                            • ((lu ▹ # R f)
                               • (psfunctor_comp R ...
                                    f • (...)))))))))
            • lα))))

((id₁ (pr1 R i)
  ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker (pr1 R)
               (biadj_unit (pr1 R)))) i
     ◃ (id₁
          ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
                     (comp_psfunctor (pr1 R) L)
                     (pr1 R))) i) ◃ rui)))
 • invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_r R) i)
▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) = ?t21

              exact (!(rwhisker_vcomp _ _ _)).

            • lα))))

 · # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)

          ▹ # R g))

                  i

                     ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor (...)
                                (...))) i) ◃ rui)))
            ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) ▹ # R g))
    • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
        ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of
             (biadj_triangle_r R) i
           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) ▹ # R g))

     • (## R (inserter_cone_cell i)
        • (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g)
          ^-1))) • lα)
• ((rα ▹ # R g)
   • (((h ◃ rα) ▹ # R g)

              ◃ (lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
             ▹ # R g)

                 ◃ ((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                     ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                                  (...) (...))) i
                        ◃ lui))
                    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                ▹ # R g)
               • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                    ◃ ((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                        ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i
                           ◃ (id₁ ... ◃ rui)))
                       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                   ▹ # R g)
                  • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
                       ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                      ▹ # R g)
                     • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu)
                        ▹ # R g)))))))) = ?t2

         i ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))
• (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu) = ?b

   ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_r R)
        i ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) = ?y'

      • (## R (inserter_cone_cell i)
         • (psfunctor_comp R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) g)
           ^-1))) = ?t2

        exact (!(lwhisker_vcomp _ _ _)).

R: left_biadj_data L

f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁

(rα • (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ (lα ▹ # R f)))
• ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
    ◃ ((lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f))
   • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
       ◃ (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
            ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                         (pr1 R) (biadj_unit (pr1 R))))
                 i ◃ lui)) ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
          ▹ # R f))
      • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
          ◃ (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
               ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                            (pr1 R)
                            (biadj_unit (pr1 R)))) i
                  ◃ (id₁
                       ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor (...)
                                  (...))) i) ◃ rui)))
              ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f))
         • (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
            ◃ (((invertible_modcomponent_of
                   (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) • lu)
               ▹ # R f))))) = ?b

             ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)))))
• (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
     (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h)
     (# R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) (# R f)) ^-1

h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
(rα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
• (((h ◃ lui) ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
   • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
        ◃ (id₁ (pr1 R i)
           ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker (pr1 R)
                        (biadj_unit (pr1 R)))) i ◃ lui)))
       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
           ◃ (id₁ (pr1 R i)
              ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                           (pr1 R)
                           (biadj_unit (pr1 R)))) i
                 ◃ (id₁
                      ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
                                 (comp_psfunctor (...)
                                    L) (pr1 R))) i)
                    ◃ rui))))
          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
         • ((((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
               ◃ invertible_modcomponent_of
                   (biadj_triangle_r R) i) • ru)
             ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f) • lα)))) =
?b

R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧

lα
• ((rα ▹ # R f)
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)

              ◃ (lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
             ▹ # R f)

                     ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                                  (...) (...))) i
                        ◃ lui))
                    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                ▹ # R f)

                        ◃ ((pr111 (...)) i

                       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                   ▹ # R f)

                       ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of
                            (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                      ▹ # R f)
                     • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lu)
                        ▹ # R f))))))))

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : h
         · (id₁ (R i) · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ==>
         h · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i), rα • z)
  (runitor_rwhisker h (# R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))): (λ z : h · (id₁ (R i) · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ==>
       h · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i), rα • z)
  (lα • (ru ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) =
(λ z : h · (id₁ (R i) · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ==>
       h · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i), rα • z)
  (h ◃ lu)
((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
  ◃ invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_r R) i)
 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
• (lα • ((ru ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)) =
?t2

        
B₁, B₂: bicat

x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : h
         · (id₁ (R i) · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ==>
         h · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i), rα • z)
  (runitor_rwhisker h (# R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))): rα • (lα • (ru ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) =
rα • (h ◃ lu)
((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
  ◃ invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_r R) i)
 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
• (lα • ((ru ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ▹ # R f)) =
?t2

        exact (maponpaths (λ z, z • _) (!(rwhisker_vcomp _ _ _))).

   • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
        ◃ (id₁ (pr1 R i)

                        (biadj_unit (pr1 R)))) i ◃ lui)))
       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)

           ◃ (id₁ (pr1 R i)

                           (pr1 R)
                           (biadj_unit (pr1 R)))) i

                         (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                   ▹ # R f)) • ((h ◃ lu) ▹ # R f)))))) =
lα
• ((rα ▹ # R f)
   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)
         • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
              ◃ (lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
             ▹ # R f)
            • (((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h

   • ((rα ▹ # R f)
      • (((h ◃ lα) ▹ # R f)

f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: B₁ ⟦ x, R i ⟧
((h
  ◃ (id₁ (pr1 R i)
     ◃ (biadj_unit (pr1 R) (pr1 R i) ◃ lui)))
 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
• ((lα • (rα ▹ # R f))
   • ((h
       ◃ ((id₁ (pr1 R i)
           ◃ (biadj_unit (pr1 R) (pr1 R i)
              ◃ (id₁ (pr1 R (L (pr1 R i))) ◃ rui)))
          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) ▹ # R f)) =
((h
  ◃ (id₁ (pr1 R i)
     ◃ (biadj_unit (pr1 R) (pr1 R i) ◃ lui)))
 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)

           ◃ (id₁ (pr1 R (L (pr1 R i))) ◃ rui))))
    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i) · # R f)
   • (lα • (rα ▹ # R f)))

    Transparent psfunctor_comp.

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
nat_trans_data
  ((biadj_left_hom R x i
    ∙ inserter_cone_functor i (L x))
   ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
       (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso f x)
       (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso g x))
  (inserter_cone_functor (psfunctor_inserter_cone R i)
     x)

f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

x: B₁
nat_trans_data
  ((biadj_left_hom R x i
    ∙ inserter_cone_functor i (L x))
   ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
       (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso f x)

     x)

R: left_biadj_data L

f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: hom x (R i)
dialgebra (post_comp x (# R f)) (post_comp x (# R g))
⟦ ((biadj_left_hom R x i
    ∙ inserter_cone_functor i (L x))
   ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
       (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso f x)
       (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso g x)) h,
inserter_cone_functor (psfunctor_inserter_cone R i) x
  h ⟧

f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: hom x (R i)
hom x (R y₁)
⟦ pr1
    (((biadj_left_hom R x i
       ∙ inserter_cone_functor i (L x))
      ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
          (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso f x)
          (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso g x)) h),
pr1
  (inserter_cone_functor (psfunctor_inserter_cone R i)
     x h) ⟧
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂

f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

dialgebra_mor_path (post_comp x (# R f))
  (post_comp x (# R g)) ?f

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: hom x (R i)
hom x (R y₁)
⟦ pr1
    (((biadj_left_hom R x i
       ∙ inserter_cone_functor i (L x))
      ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
          (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso f x)
          (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso g x)) h),
pr1
  (inserter_cone_functor (psfunctor_inserter_cone R i)
     x h) ⟧
 exact (right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_cell h).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: hom x (R i)
dialgebra_mor_path (post_comp x (# R f))
  (post_comp x (# R g))
  (right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_cell h)
 exact (right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_path h).
    Defined.

B₁, B₂: bicat

f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
# ((biadj_left_hom R x i
    ∙ inserter_cone_functor i (L x))
   ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
       (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso f x)
       (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso g x)) α
· right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_data h₂ =
right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_data h₁
· # (inserter_cone_functor
       (psfunctor_inserter_cone R i) x) α

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L

f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
pr1
  (# ((biadj_left_hom R x i
       ∙ inserter_cone_functor i (L x))
      ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
          (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso f x)
          (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso g x)) α
   · right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_data h₂) =
pr1
  (right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_data h₁
   · # (inserter_cone_functor
          (psfunctor_inserter_cone R i) x) α)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ ## R
     ((## L α ▹ biadj_counit R i)
      ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 i))
• right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_cell h₂ =
right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_cell h₁
• (α ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ ## R
     ((## L α ▹ biadj_counit R i)
      ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 i))
• (((((((biadj_unit R x
         ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R
               (# L h₂ · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
               (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1
            • ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h₂)
                  (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
               ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))) • lα)
       • (lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
      • ((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h₂
          ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
         ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) • rα) • rα)
   • (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
      ◃ ((lα
          • (((lui
               • (id₁ (pr1 R i)
                  ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                               (pr1 R)
                               (biadj_unit (...)))) i
                     ◃ (lui • (id₁ (... i) ◃ rui)))))
              • invertible_modcomponent_of
                  (biadj_triangle_r R) i)
             ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) • lu))) =
(((((((biadj_unit R x
       ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R
             (# L h₁ · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
             (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1
          • ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h₁)
                (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
             ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))) • lα)
     • (lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
    • ((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h₁
        ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) • rα) • rα)
 • (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
    ◃ ((lα
        • (((lui
             • (id₁ (pr1 R i)
                ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                             (pr1 R)
                             (biadj_unit (...)))) i
                   ◃ (lui • (id₁ (... i) ◃ rui)))))
            • invertible_modcomponent_of
                (biadj_triangle_r R) i)
           ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) • lu)))
• (α ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ ## R

    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
   • (is_invertible_2cell_inv
        (psfunctor_comp R (# L h₂ · biadj_counit R i)
           (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) ^-1)

            
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
(is_invertible_2cell_inv
   (psfunctor_comp R (# L h₁ · biadj_counit R i)
      (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) ^-1
• ## R
    ((## L α ▹ biadj_counit R i) ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 i) =
(## R (## L α ▹ biadj_counit R i)
 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
• (is_invertible_2cell_inv
     (psfunctor_comp R (# L h₂ · biadj_counit R i)
        (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) ^-1

            exact (psfunctor_rwhisker
                     R
                     (inserter_cone_pr1 i)
                     (## L α ▹ biadj_counit R i)).
          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
H: ## R
  ((## L α ▹ biadj_counit R i)
   ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 i)
• (psfunctor_comp R (# L h₂ · biadj_counit R i)
     (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp R (# L h₁ · biadj_counit R i)
   (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1
• (## R (## L α ▹ biadj_counit R i)
   ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
## R
  ((## L α ▹ biadj_counit R i) ▹ inserter_cone_pr1 i)
• (psfunctor_comp R (# L h₂ · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
     (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1 = ?t2

          exact H.

L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
biadj_unit R x
◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h₁ · biadj_counit R i)
      (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1
   • (## R (## L α ▹ biadj_counit R i)
      ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) = ?y'

   ◃ (## R (## L α ▹ biadj_counit R i)
      ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
((biadj_unit R x
  ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (# L h₁ · biadj_counit R i)
       (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1)
 • (biadj_unit R x
    ◃ (## R (## L α ▹ biadj_counit R i)
       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h₂)
          (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
   • (lα
      • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
         • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h₂
              ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
             ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
            • (rα
               • (rα
                  • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂ ◃ lα)
                     • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
                         ◃ (lui
                            ▹ # R
                                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                        • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
                            ◃ (((...) • (...))
                               ▹ # R
                                   (inserter_cone_pr1
                                      i)))
                           • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
                               ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of
                                    ... i ▹ # R ...))
                              • (# (id_psfunctor B₁)
                                   h₂ ◃ lu))))))))))) =
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (# L h₁ · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
      (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1)
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h₁)
          (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
   • (lα
      • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
         • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h₁
              ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
             ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
            • (rα
               • (rα
                  • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁ ◃ lα)
                     • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                         ◃ (lui
                            ▹ # R
                                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                        • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                            ◃ (((...) • (...))
                               ▹ # R
                                   (inserter_cone_pr1
                                      i)))
                           • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                               ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of
                                    ... i ▹ # R ...))
                              • ((# ... h₁ ◃ lu)
                                 • (α ▹ # R ...))))))))))))

f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

x: B₁

α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (# L h₁ · biadj_counit R i)
      (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1)

    ◃ (## R (## L α ▹ biadj_counit R i)
       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
   • ((biadj_unit R x

                 ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))

                        • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
                            ◃ (lui
                               ▹ # R
                                   (inserter_cone_pr1
                                      i)))
                           • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
                               ◃ ((...) ▹ # R ...))
                              • ((# ... h₂ ◃ (...))
                                 • (# ... h₂ ◃ lu)))))))))))) =
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ (psfunctor_comp R (# L h₁ · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
      (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1)
• ((biadj_unit R x
    ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h₁)
          (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
   • (lα
      • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
         • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h₁
              ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
             ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))

               • (rα
                  • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁ ◃ lα)
                     • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                         ◃ (lui
                            ▹ # R
                                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                        • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                            ◃ (((...) • (...))
                               ▹ # R
                                   (inserter_cone_pr1
                                      i)))
                           • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                               ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of
                                    ... i ▹ # R ...))
                              • ((# ... h₁ ◃ lu)
                                 • (α ▹ # R ...))))))))))))

   • (lα

                                      i)))

                                    ... i ▹ # R ...))
                              • (# (id_psfunctor B₁)
                                   h₂ ◃ lu))))))))))) =
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h₁)
       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
• (lα
   • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
      • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h₁
           ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
         • (rα
            • (rα
               • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁ ◃ lα)
                  • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                      ◃ (lui
                         ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                     • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                         ◃ (((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                             • (id₁ ... ◃ (...)))
                            ▹ # R
                                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                        • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                            ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of
                                 (biadj_triangle_r R)
                                 i
                               ▹ # R
                                   (inserter_cone_pr1
                                      i)))
                           • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                               ◃ lu)
                              • (α
                                 ▹ # R
                                     (inserter_cone_pr1
                                        i))))))))))))

                               ▹ # R

                                      i)))
                           • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                               ◃ lu)

                                 ▹ # R

                                        i))))))))))))

i: inserter_cone f g

h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
## R (## L α ▹ biadj_counit R i)
• (psfunctor_comp R (# L h₂) (biadj_counit R i)) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp R (# L h₁) (biadj_counit R i)) ^-1
• (## R (## L α) ▹ # R (biadj_counit R i))

H: ## R (## L α ▹ biadj_counit R i)
• (psfunctor_comp R (# L h₂) (biadj_counit R i))
  ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp R (# L h₁) (biadj_counit R i)) ^-1
• (## R (## L α) ▹ # R (biadj_counit R i))
## R (## L α ▹ biadj_counit R i)
• (psfunctor_comp R (# L h₂) (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
  ^-1 = ?t2

   ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) = ?y'

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
((biadj_unit R x
  ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h₁) (biadj_counit R i))
     ^-1 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
 • (biadj_unit R x
    ◃ ((## R (## L α) ▹ # R (biadj_counit R i))
       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))
• (lα
   • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
      • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h₂
           ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
         • (rα
            • (rα
               • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂ ◃ lα)
                  • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
                      ◃ (lui
                         ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                     • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
                         ◃ (((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                             • (id₁ ... ◃ (...)))
                            ▹ # R
                                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                        • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
                            ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of
                                 (biadj_triangle_r R)
                                 i
                               ▹ # R
                                   (inserter_cone_pr1
                                      i)))
                           • (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
                              ◃ lu)))))))))) =
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h₁)
       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
• (lα
   • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
      • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h₁
           ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
         • (rα
            • (rα
               • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁ ◃ lα)
                  • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                      ◃ (lui
                         ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                     • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                         ◃ (((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                             • (id₁ ... ◃ (...)))
                            ▹ # R
                                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                        • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                            ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of
                                 (biadj_triangle_r R)
                                 i
                               ▹ # R
                                   (inserter_cone_pr1
                                      i)))
                           • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                               ◃ lu)
                              • (α
                                 ▹ # R
                                     (inserter_cone_pr1
                                        i))))))))))))

    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))

    ◃ ((## R (## L α) ▹ # R (biadj_counit R i))

   • (lα

                         ◃ (lui
                            ▹ # R

                        • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂

                                      i)))

                               ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of
                                    ... i ▹ # R ...))
                              • (# (id_psfunctor B₁)
                                   h₂ ◃ lu))))))))))) =
(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h₁)
       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
• (lα
   • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
      • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h₁
           ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))

               • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁ ◃ lα)
                  • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                      ◃ (lui
                         ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))

                         ◃ (((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                             • (id₁ ... ◃ (...)))
                            ▹ # R
                                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                        • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                            ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of
                                 (biadj_triangle_r R)
                                 i
                               ▹ # R
                                   (inserter_cone_pr1
                                      i)))
                           • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                               ◃ lu)

                                     (inserter_cone_pr1
                                        i))))))))))))

 ◃ ((## R (## L α) ▹ # R (biadj_counit R i))
    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
• (lα
   • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
      • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h₂
           ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
         • (rα

                  • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
                      ◃ (lui
                         ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))

                             • (id₁ ... ◃ (...)))
                            ▹ # R
                                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))

                                      i)))

lα
• ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
   • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h₁
        ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
      • (rα
         • (rα
            • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁ ◃ lα)
               • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                   ◃ (lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                  • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                      ◃ (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                           ◃ (... i ◃ lui))

                             ◃ (... i ◃ (...))))
                         ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                     • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁

                              (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                            ▹ # R
                                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                        • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                            ◃ lu)

                              ▹ # R
                                  (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))))))))))

(biadj_unit R x
 ◃ ((## R (## L α) ▹ # R (biadj_counit R i))
    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
• (lα
   • ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
      • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h₂
           ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
          ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
         • (rα
            • (rα
               • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂ ◃ lα)
                  • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
                      ◃ (lui
