                                      i)))
                           • (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
                              ◃ lu)))))))))) = ?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
?b =
lα
• ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
   • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h₁
        ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
      • (rα
         • (rα
            • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁ ◃ lα)
               • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                   ◃ (lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                  • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                      ◃ (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                           ◃ (... i ◃ lui))
                          • (id₁ (pr1 R i)
                             ◃ (... i ◃ (...))))
                         ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                     • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                         ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of
                              (biadj_triangle_r R) i
                            ▹ # R
                                (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                        • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
                            ◃ lu)
                           • (α
                              ▹ # R
                                  (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))))))))))

                           • (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂

((biadj_unit R x
  ◃ ((## R (## L α) ▹ # R (biadj_counit R i))
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) • lα)

   • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h₂
        ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))

                     • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂

?b

        apply rwhisker_lwhisker.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

x: B₁

(lα
 • ((biadj_unit R x
     ◃ (## R (## L α) ▹ # R (biadj_counit R i)))
    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
• ((lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
   • (((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h₂
        ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
       ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
      • (rα
         • (rα
            • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂ ◃ lα)
               • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
                   ◃ (lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                  • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
                      ◃ (((id₁ (pr1 R i)

                     • (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂ ◃ lu)))))))) =

                   ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
               • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁ ◃ lu)
                  • (α ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))))))

(((α ▹ biadj_unit R (R i))
  ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
 ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
• (rα

         • ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
             ◃ (lui ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))

                ◃ (((id₁ (pr1 R i)
                     ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker

                                    (...) (...))) i
                          ◃ (id₁ (... i) ◃ rui))))

                      ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
                  • (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂ ◃ lu))))))) =
?b

               • (α ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))))))

R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
(α
 ▹ id₁ (pr1 R i)
   · ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker (pr1 R)
                (biadj_unit (pr1 R)))) i
      · (id₁
           ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
                      (comp_psfunctor (pr1 R) L)
                      (pr1 R))) i)
         · ((pr111 (Whiskering.left_whisker (pr1 R)
                      (biadj_counit (pr1 R)))) i
            · id₁ (pr1 R i))))
   · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
• ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
    ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_r R)
         i ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
   • (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂ ◃ lu)) =
(# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
 ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_r R) i
    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
• ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁ ◃ lu)
   • (α ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))

R: left_biadj_data L

i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
(α
 ▹ id₁ (pr1 R i)
   · ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker (pr1 R)
                (biadj_unit (pr1 R)))) i
      · (id₁
           ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
                      (comp_psfunctor (pr1 R) L)
                      (pr1 R))) i)
         · ((pr111 (Whiskering.left_whisker (pr1 R)
                      (biadj_counit (pr1 R)))) i
            · id₁ (pr1 R i))))
   · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
• ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
    ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_r R)
         i ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
   • (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂ ◃ lu)) = ?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
?b =
(# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
 ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_r R) i
    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
• ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁ ◃ lu)
   • (α ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
((α
  ▹ id₁ (pr1 R i)
    · ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker (pr1 R)
                 (biadj_unit (pr1 R)))) i
       · (id₁
            ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
                       (comp_psfunctor (pr1 R) L)
                       (pr1 R))) i)
          · ((pr111 (Whiskering.left_whisker (pr1 R)
                       (biadj_counit (pr1 R)))) i
             · id₁ (pr1 R i))))
    · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
 • (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
    ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_r R)
         i ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))))
• (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂ ◃ lu) = ?b

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
(α
 ▹ id₁ (pr1 R i)
   · ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker (pr1 R)
                (biadj_unit (pr1 R)))) i
      · (id₁
           ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
                      (comp_psfunctor (pr1 R) L)
                      (pr1 R))) i)
         · ((pr111 (Whiskering.left_whisker (pr1 R)
                      (biadj_counit (pr1 R)))) i
            · id₁ (pr1 R i))))
   · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
• (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂
   ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_r R)
        i ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) = ?y'

        apply vcomp_whisker.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
((h₁
  ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_r R) i
     ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
 • (α
    ▹ id_pstrans (pr1 R) i · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
• (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂ ◃ lu) =
(# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
 ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_r R) i
    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
• ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁ ◃ lu)
   • (α ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat

R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
(h₁
 ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_r R) i
    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
• ((α
    ▹ id_pstrans (pr1 R) i · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
   • (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂ ◃ lu)) =
(# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁
 ◃ (invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_r R) i
    ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
• ((# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁ ◃ lu)

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h₁, h₂: hom x (R i)
α: hom x (R i) ⟦ h₁, h₂ ⟧
(α ▹ id_pstrans (pr1 R) i · # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))
• (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₂ ◃ lu) =
(# (id_psfunctor B₁) h₁ ◃ lu)
• (α ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))

      apply vcomp_whisker.
    Qed.

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
(biadj_left_hom R x i ∙ inserter_cone_functor i (L x))
∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
    (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso f x)
    (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso g x)
⟹ inserter_cone_functor (psfunctor_inserter_cone R i)
    x

(biadj_left_hom R x i ∙ inserter_cone_functor i (L x))

    (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso g x)

x: B₁
nat_trans_data
  ((biadj_left_hom R x i
    ∙ inserter_cone_functor i (L x))
   ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
       (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso f x)
       (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso g x))
  (inserter_cone_functor (psfunctor_inserter_cone R i)
     x)
B₁, B₂: bicat

R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
is_nat_trans
  ((biadj_left_hom R x i
    ∙ inserter_cone_functor i (L x))
   ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
       (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso f x)
       (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso g x))
  (inserter_cone_functor (psfunctor_inserter_cone R i)
     x) ?t

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
nat_trans_data
  ((biadj_left_hom R x i
    ∙ inserter_cone_functor i (L x))
   ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
       (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso f x)
       (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso g x))
  (inserter_cone_functor (psfunctor_inserter_cone R i)
     x)
 exact right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_data.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
is_nat_trans
  ((biadj_left_hom R x i
    ∙ inserter_cone_functor i (L x))
   ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
       (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso f x)
       (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso g x))
  (inserter_cone_functor (psfunctor_inserter_cone R i)
     x) right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans_data
 exact right_biadj_preserves_inserters_is_nat_trans.
    Defined.

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: hom x (R i)
is_invertible_2cell
  (pr1 (right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans h))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: hom x (R i)
is_invertible_2cell
  (((((((biadj_unit R x
         ◃ ((psfunctor_comp R
               (# L h · biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)
               (inserter_cone_pr1 i)) ^-1
            • ((psfunctor_comp R (# L h)
                  (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i)) ^-1
               ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))) • lα)
       • (lα ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i)))
      • ((psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h
          ▹ # R (biadj_counit (pr1 R) i))
         ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) • rα) • rα)
   • (# (id_psfunctor B₁) h
      ◃ ((lα
          • (((lui
               • (id₁ (pr1 R i)
                  ◃ ((pr111 (Whiskering.right_whisker
                               (pr1 R)
                               (biadj_unit (pr1 R))))
                       i
                     ◃ (lui
                        • (id₁ ((pr111 ...) i) ◃ rui)))))
              • invertible_modcomponent_of
                  (biadj_triangle_r R) i)
             ▹ # R (inserter_cone_pr1 i))) • lu)))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: hom x (R i)
is_invertible_2cell (psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h)
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: hom x (R i)
is_invertible_2cell
  (invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_r R) i)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: hom x (R i)
is_invertible_2cell (psnaturality_of (biadj_unit R) h)
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
x: B₁
h: hom x (R i)
is_invertible_2cell
  (invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_r R) i)
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
    Defined.
  End PreserveInserterNatIso.

R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
preserves_inserters R

R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
Hi: has_inserter_ump i
x: B₁
nat_z_iso (?L ∙ post_comp x (# R f))
  (post_comp (L x) f ∙ ?L')
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
Hi: has_inserter_ump i
x: B₁
nat_z_iso (?L ∙ post_comp x (# R g))
  (post_comp (L x) g ∙ ?L')

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
Hi: has_inserter_ump i
x: B₁
hom (L x) y₁ ⟶ hom x (R y₁)
 exact (biadj_right_hom R x y₁).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
Hi: has_inserter_ump i
x: B₁
hom (L x) y₂ ⟶ hom x (R y₂)
 exact (biadj_right_hom R x y₂).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
Hi: has_inserter_ump i
x: B₁
nat_z_iso
  (biadj_right_hom R x y₁ ∙ post_comp x (# R f))
  (post_comp (L x) f ∙ biadj_right_hom R x y₂)
 exact (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso f x).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
Hi: has_inserter_ump i
x: B₁
nat_z_iso
  (biadj_right_hom R x y₁ ∙ post_comp x (# R g))
  (post_comp (L x) g ∙ biadj_right_hom R x y₂)
 exact (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso g x).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
Hi: has_inserter_ump i
x: B₁
(biadj_left_hom R x i ∙ inserter_cone_functor i (L x))
∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
    (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso f x)
    (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso g x)
⟹ inserter_cone_functor (psfunctor_inserter_cone R i)
    x
 exact (right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans i x).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
Hi: has_inserter_ump i
x: B₁
is_nat_z_iso
  (right_biadj_preserves_inserters_nat_trans i x)
 exact (right_biadj_preserves_inserters_is_nat_z_iso i x).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
y₁, y₂: B₂
f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
Hi: has_inserter_ump i
x: B₁
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  ((biadj_left_hom R x i
    ∙ inserter_cone_functor i (L x))
   ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
       (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso f x)
       (inserter_commute_nat_z_iso g x))

Hi: has_inserter_ump i
x: B₁
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (biadj_left_hom R x i
   ∙ inserter_cone_functor i (L x))

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

 exact (biadj_hom_equiv R x i).
        
B₁, B₂: bicat

R: left_biadj_data L

f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

x: B₁
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (inserter_cone_functor i (L x))
 apply (make_is_universal_inserter_cone HB₂ _ Hi).

i: inserter_cone f g

adj_equivalence_of_cats (biadj_right_hom R x y₁)
 exact (adj_equivalence_of_cats_inv (biadj_hom_equiv R x y₁)).
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

f, g: B₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
i: inserter_cone f g
Hi: has_inserter_ump i
x: B₁
adj_equivalence_of_cats (biadj_right_hom R x y₂)
 exact (adj_equivalence_of_cats_inv (biadj_hom_equiv R x y₂)).
  Defined.
End BiadjunctionPreservation.
